description: Discovery reduces risk before committing to delivery. These discovery tracks test whether a potential solution is valuable, viable, usable, and feasible.

riskFramework.question: Will customers buy the product and/or choose to use it?
Will the solution meet the needs of the business?
Can customers figure out how to use it?
Can we build it within given resources and constraints?

items.title: Revenue Operations Control Tower: CFO / Legal, Compliance and Security Leadership discovery
items.name: Revenue Operations Control Tower: CFO / Legal, Compliance and Security Leadership discovery
items.summary: Discovery work for Revenue Operations Control Tower is reducing uncertainty before delivery investment by testing demand, business fit, usability, and buildability for CFO / Legal, Compliance and Security Leadership.
items.opportunity: Clarify whether stronger unified revenue data model and integration adapters and migration toolkit create enough customer and business value to justify further delivery across Revenue Operations Control Tower Web Workspace, Revenue Operations Control Tower Dashboard.

linkedInitiatives.description: Revenue Operations Control Tower initiative focused on improving unified revenue data model, integration adapters and migration toolkit, strengthening customer value for CFO / Legal, Compliance and Security Leadership, and evolving delivery across Revenue Operations Control Tower Web Workspace, Revenue Operations Control Tower Dashboard.

assignments.how: Leads the discovery framing, customer learning plan, and recommendation for how Revenue Operations Control Tower should prove value for CFO / Legal, Compliance and Security Leadership.

assignments.teamName: Revenue Operations Platform - Integration Adapters Migration
assignments.how: Supports the discovery with workflow detail, prototype feedback, and evidence on unified revenue data model and integration adapters and migration toolkit.

assignments.teamName: Revenue Operations Platform - Propensity Deal Scoring
assignments.how: Supports the discovery with workflow detail, prototype feedback, and evidence on unified revenue data model and integration adapters and migration toolkit.

assignments.teamName: Enterprise Data Office - Enterprise Metric Layer
assignments.how: Supports the discovery with workflow detail, prototype feedback, and evidence on unified revenue data model and integration adapters and migration toolkit.

riskFocus.question: Will customers buy the product and/or choose to use it?
riskFocus.hypothesis: CFO / Legal, Compliance and Security Leadership will choose Revenue Operations Control Tower because unified revenue data model and integration adapters and migration toolkit solve a high-friction workflow.
evidenceToCollect: Whether CFO / Legal, Compliance and Security Leadership describes unified revenue data model as a top priority problem.
Whether concept tests show intent to adopt or pay for the improved Revenue Operations Control Tower experience.

riskFocus.question: Will the solution meet the needs of the business?
riskFocus.hypothesis: The business can justify investment in Revenue Operations Control Tower if unified revenue data model and integration adapters and migration toolkit improve target KPIs without creating unacceptable operating cost.
evidenceToCollect: What commercial, compliance, or operational constraints affect the Revenue Operations Control Tower case.
Which KPI movement would make the solution worth funding.

riskFocus.question: Can customers figure out how to use it?
riskFocus.hypothesis: CFO / Legal, Compliance and Security Leadership can understand and complete the core Revenue Operations Control Tower workflow with minimal guidance.
evidenceToCollect: Where users hesitate or need explanation in prototypes covering unified revenue data model and integration adapters and migration toolkit.
Whether the workflow language, navigation, and sequencing are clear enough for first-time use.

riskFocus.question: Can we build it within given resources and constraints?
riskFocus.hypothesis: The teams can deliver the smallest useful version of Revenue Operations Control Tower within current technology, staffing, and dependency constraints.
evidenceToCollect: Which architecture, integration, or data constraints sit behind unified revenue data model and integration adapters and migration toolkit.
Whether delivery can be sliced into a realistic first release.

plannedActivities: Interview target users from the CFO / Legal, Compliance and Security Leadership segment about current workflow pain and willingness to switch.
Prototype and test the end-to-end journey covering unified revenue data model and integration adapters and migration toolkit.
Run a business and delivery review to define the smallest viable slice across Revenue Operations Control Tower Web Workspace, Revenue Operations Control Tower Dashboard.
items.decisionToMake: Decide whether to proceed, narrow, or stop further investment in this Revenue Operations Control Tower opportunity.
